notes: Launcher works, but only displays a white box. Clicking in the correct part of the launcher (the left upper side) will launch the game, and the campaign map, menus, music/sound, and cinematics work without issue. The battle map is however completely broken; units and the cursor are invisible, buttons are templates. Only playable if auto resolving battles.
title: Medieval: Total War™ - Collection

notes: You need change your game version, go to properties of the game -> Betas and choose  the "previous_version" . With this you can run battle mode without problem.
title: Medieval: Total War™ - Collection

notes: Go into game properties and set it to betas "previous_version" otherwise game GUI wont work and units don't render
title: Medieval: Total War™ - Collection
